playbook.intent: Monthly 1-hour ritual: pull affiliate and referral stats, approve commissions, pay out, message top referrers.
playbook.scope: Monthly 1-hour ritual: pull affiliate and referral stats, approve commissions, pay out, message top referrers.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Approve / reject

tasks.task: Note the reason for any rejection

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when each row has a status.

stage.name: Run the payout
stage.intent: Send the money on the same day.

tasks.task: Send the payout receipt to each affiliate

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every payout shows sent.

stage.name: Thank top referrers
stage.intent: Treat your distribution channel like family.

tasks.task: Offer a perk (early access, bonus, shoutout)

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when every top referrer is thanked.

stage.name: Tune the program

tasks.task: Decide one tweak (rate, cookie window, copy)

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when next-month tweak is queued.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-payout --format md, agent: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-payout --format context, json: faion get-content affiliate-referral-check-payout --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
